_comment: Runtime config for the glibc rootfs bootstrap. Edited by Phase 1 ContainerManager.
notes: Official Debian bookworm aarch64 rootfs from debuerreotype (Apache-2.0).
proot binary must be placed as app/src/main/jniLibs/arm64-v8a/libproot.so
Build proot from https://github.com/proot-me/proot (static aarch64 build)
Or use the Termux-packaged static proot: pkg install proot; cp $(which proot) libproot.so
